name: SCC_PowerDeliveryRes
title: SCC_PowerDeliveryRes
syntax: void SCC_PowerDeliveryRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Power Delivery Response is received. Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with:

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
